1вҶ’from typing import Iterable
     2вҶ’
     3вҶ’
     4вҶ’def select_enum_type(name: str, enum_base: Iterable[str]) -> str:
     5вҶ’    selected = None
     6вҶ’    max_opt = len(enum_base)
     7вҶ’    while not selected:
     8вҶ’        print(f"Choose you {name}:")
     9вҶ’        for idx, enum_item in enumerate(enum_base):
    10вҶ’            print(f"\t{idx}: {enum_item}")
    11вҶ’        try:
    12вҶ’            print("Enter -1 to avoid selecting a topic.\n")
    13вҶ’            choice = int(input(f"Enter the number for your {name}: "))
    14вҶ’        except ValueError:
    15вҶ’            print("You must write just the option number.\nTry again.")
    16вҶ’            continue
    17вҶ’        if choice < 0:
    18вҶ’            raise StopIteration
    19вҶ’        elif choice < max_opt:
    20вҶ’            selected = list(enum_base)[choice]
    21вҶ’        else:
    22вҶ’            print(f"You must choose between [0, {max_opt - 1}].\nTry again.")
    23вҶ’    return selected
    24вҶ’

1вҶ’import re
     2вҶ’import types
     3вҶ’
     4вҶ’import pytest
     5вҶ’
     6вҶ’try:
     7вҶ’    # Importa el entry point exacto que indicaste
     8вҶ’    from itep.links import cli
     9вҶ’except Exception as e:
    10вҶ’    pytest.fail(f"No se pudo importar itep.links:cli ({e})")
    11вҶ’
    12вҶ’
    13вҶ’def test_cli_is_click_command():
    14вҶ’    """
    15вҶ’    Verifica que 'cli' sea un comando de Click (BaseCommand o subclase).
    16вҶ’    Evita atarse a si es Group o Command.
    17вҶ’    """
    18вҶ’    try:
    19вҶ’        import click
    20вҶ’    except Exception as e:  # pragma: no cover
    21вҶ’        pytest.skip(f"Click no estГЎ instalado en el entorno de test: {e}")
    22вҶ’
    23вҶ’    assert (
    24вҶ’        hasattr(cli, "main")
    25вҶ’        or hasattr(cli, "callback")
    26вҶ’        or isinstance(cli, click.core.BaseCommand)
    27вҶ’    ), "El objeto 'cli' no parece ser un comando Click vГЎlido"
    28вҶ’
    29вҶ’
    30вҶ’def test_cli_help_runs_and_shows_usage(capsys):
    31вҶ’    """
    32вҶ’    Ejecuta 'cli --help' y exige exit_code == 0.
    33вҶ’    No depende de opciones de negocio ni del filesystem.
    34вҶ’    """
    35вҶ’    import click
    36вҶ’    from click.testing import CliRunner
    37вҶ’
    38вҶ’    runner = CliRunner()
    39вҶ’    result = runner.invoke(cli, ["--help"])
    40вҶ’
    41вҶ’    # Debe terminar correctamente
    42вҶ’    assert result.exit_code == 0, (
    43вҶ’        f"cli --help devolviГі exit_code {result.exit_code}\n"
    44вҶ’        f"stdout:\n{result.stdout}\n"
    45вҶ’        f"stderr:\n{result.stderr}"
    46вҶ’    )
    47вҶ’
    48вҶ’    # Debe mostrar algГәn encabezado tГӯpico de Click
    49вҶ’    out = result.stdout or ""
    50вҶ’    assert "Usage" in out or "Uso" in out or "Options" in out, (
    51вҶ’        "La salida de ayuda no contiene encabezados esperables de Click.\n"
    52вҶ’        f"stdout:\n{out}"
    53вҶ’    )
    54вҶ’
    55вҶ’
    56вҶ’def test_cli_version_if_available():
    57вҶ’    """
    58вҶ’    Si el comando soporta --version (o -V), lo probamos.
    59вҶ’    Detectamos la bandera leyendo el help para evitar falsos negativos.
    60вҶ’    """
    61вҶ’    from click.testing import CliRunner
    62вҶ’
    63вҶ’    runner = CliRunner()
    64вҶ’    help_out = runner.invoke(cli, ["--help"]).stdout or ""
    65вҶ’
    66вҶ’    # Detecta banderas de versiГіn comunes en Click
    67вҶ’    has_version = any(flag in help_out for flag in ["--version", "-V"])
    68вҶ’
    69вҶ’    if not has_version:
    70вҶ’        pytest.skip("El CLI no declara --version/-V en la ayuda; se omite esta prueba.")
    71вҶ’
    72вҶ’    # Prueba la(s) bandera(s) declaradas
    73вҶ’    # Orden: primero --version si existe, si no -V
    74вҶ’    for flag in ("--version", "-V"):
    75вҶ’        if flag in help_out:
    76вҶ’            res = runner.invoke(cli, [flag])
    77вҶ’            assert res.exit_code == 0, f"{flag} devolviГі exit_code {res.exit_code}"
    78вҶ’            # La mayorГӯa de Click imprime algo tipo 'prog, version x.y'
    79вҶ’            # No exigimos un formato estricto; solo que haya algo con dГӯgitos.
    80вҶ’            assert re.search(r"\d+\.\d+", res.stdout or ""), f"La salida de {
    81вҶ’                flag
    82вҶ’            } no parece contener un nГәmero de versiГіn:\n{res.stdout}"
    83вҶ’            break
    84вҶ’
    85вҶ’
    86вҶ’def test_cli_invocation_without_args_shows_usage_or_succeeds():
    87вҶ’    """
    88вҶ’    Invocar sin argumentos puede:
    89вҶ’      - devolver 0 (si hay defaults), o
    90вҶ’      - devolver 2 e imprimir 'Usage:' (Click cuando faltan args requeridos).
    91вҶ’
    92вҶ’    Aceptamos ambas rutas para que el test sea estable sin conocer tus opciones.
    93вҶ’    """
    94вҶ’    from click.testing import CliRunner
    95вҶ’
    96вҶ’    runner = CliRunner()
    97вҶ’    res = runner.invoke(cli, [])
    98вҶ’    if res.exit_code == 0:
    99вҶ’        # Perfecto: el comando tiene comportamiento por defecto
   100вҶ’        assert True
   101вҶ’    else:
   102вҶ’        # Para Click, falta de argumentos requeridos suele ser exit_code == 2
   103вҶ’        assert res.exit_code in (1, 2), f"exit_code inesperado: {res.exit_code}"
   104вҶ’        assert "Usage:" in (res.stdout or "") or "Uso:" in (res.stdout or ""), (
   105вҶ’            "Al fallar sin args, se esperaba que la salida incluyera 'Usage:' de Click.\n"
   106вҶ’            f"stdout:\n{res.stdout}\n"
   107вҶ’            f"stderr:\n{res.stderr}"
   108вҶ’        )
   109вҶ’

1вҶ’# CLAUDE.md
     2вҶ’
     3вҶ’This file provides guidance to Claude Code (claude.ai/code) when working with code in this repository.
     4вҶ’
     5вҶ’## Project Overview
     6вҶ’
     7вҶ’WorkFlow is a Python CLI toolkit for managing LaTeX projects, focused on academic writing (thesis, lectures, exercises). It provides several independent CLI tools built with Click.
     8вҶ’
     9вҶ’## Commands
    10вҶ’
    11вҶ’```bash
    12вҶ’# Install (editable)
    13вҶ’pip install -e .
    14вҶ’# or with uv
    15вҶ’uv sync
    16вҶ’
    17вҶ’# Run all tests
    18вҶ’pytest
    19вҶ’
    20вҶ’# Run a single test file
    21вҶ’pytest tests/test_links_cli.py
    22вҶ’
    23вҶ’# Lint (matches CI)
    24вҶ’flake8 . --count --select=E9,F63,F7,F82 --show-source --statistics
    25вҶ’flake8 . --count --exit-zero --max-complexity=10 --max-line-length=127 --statistics
    26вҶ’```
    27вҶ’
    28вҶ’## CLI Entry Points
    29вҶ’
    30вҶ’Defined in `pyproject.toml` under `[project.scripts]`:
    31вҶ’
    32вҶ’| Command    | Module              | Purpose                              |
    33вҶ’|------------|---------------------|--------------------------------------|
    34вҶ’| `workflow` | `main:cli`          | Main interactive menu                |
    35вҶ’| `inittex`  | `itep.create:cli`   | Initialize LaTeX project structure   |
    36вҶ’| `relink`   | `itep.links:cli`    | Recreate symlinks from config.yaml   |
    37вҶ’| `cleta`    | `lectkit.cleta:cli` | Clean TeX auxiliary files            |
    38вҶ’| `crete`    | `lectkit.crete:cli` | Create exercise files from book refs |
    39вҶ’| `nofi`     | `lectkit.nofi:cli`  | Split marked notes into LaTeX files  |
    40вҶ’
    41вҶ’## Architecture
    42вҶ’
    43вҶ’### Module Structure
    44вҶ’
    45вҶ’- **`src/itep/`** вҖ” Init TeX Project (ITeP). Core module for creating and managing LaTeX project structures. Uses dataclasses in `structure.py` for project models (`ProjectStructure`, `MetaData`, `Admin`, `Topic`, `Book`). Config is stored as `config.yaml` per project. `database.py` has Django ORM models for persistence.
    46вҶ’
    47вҶ’- **`src/lectkit/`** вҖ” Lecture utilities. Three standalone scripts: `cleta` (cleanup), `nofi` (notes-to-files using `%>path` / `%>END` markers), `crete` (exercise generation from JSON book metadata).
    48вҶ’
    49вҶ’- **`src/prismar/`** вҖ” PRISMA systematic review tools. **Status: on pause** (being developed in another repo).
    50вҶ’
    51вҶ’- **`src/appfunc/`** вҖ” Shared utilities: input validation with regex (`FieldSpec` pattern in `iofunc.py`), enum selection (`options.py`), menu interface (`mainmenu.py`).
    52вҶ’
    53вҶ’### Key Patterns
    54вҶ’
    55вҶ’- All CLIs use **Click** with groups and commands
    56вҶ’- Project config stored as **YAML** (`config.yaml`), read/written via `itep/utils.py`
    57вҶ’- User-level config goes to `~/.config/` via **appdirs**
    58вҶ’- Models use Python **dataclasses** with field metadata for validation specs
    59вҶ’- Project types: `GeneralProject` and `LectureProject` (see `itep/models.py`)
    60вҶ’- Institutions enum: UCR, UFide, UCIMED (Costa Rican universities)
    61вҶ’
    62вҶ’## Build & CI
    63вҶ’
    64вҶ’- Build backend: `uv_build`
    65вҶ’- Python: `>=3.10`
    66вҶ’- CI: GitHub Actions on push/PR to `master`, tests on Python 3.9/3.10/3.11
    67вҶ’- Linter: flake8 (max line length 127, max complexity 10)
    68вҶ’- Test framework: pytest (pythonpath configured to `"."`)
    69вҶ’

   294вҶ’## Main topic directory structure
   295вҶ’
   296вҶ’```bash
   297вҶ’${ABS_PARENT_DIR}/${ROOT}
   298вҶ’в”ңв”Җ tex
   299вҶ’в”Ӯ  в”ңв”Җ notes
   300вҶ’в”Ӯ  в”ңв”Җ resumes
   301вҶ’в”Ӯ  в””в”Җ 'C{ch:02d}S{sec}'
   302вҶ’в”Ӯ     в””в”Җ '{par:03d}-{content_name}.tex'
   303вҶ’в”ңв”Җ bib
   304вҶ’в”Ӯ  в””в”Җ FROM_ZOTERO.bib
   305вҶ’в”ңв”Җ img
   306вҶ’в”Ӯ  в”ңв”Җ own -> ${ABS_PARENT_DIR}/00II-ImagesFigures/${CODE}
   307вҶ’в”Ӯ  в””в”Җ '{BOOK_REFERENCE}' -> ${ABS_PARENT_DIR}/00II-ImagesFigures/${BOOK_REFERENCE}
   308вҶ’в”ңв”Җ config
   309вҶ’в”Ӯ  в”ңв”Җ 0_packages.sty -> ${ABS_SRC_DIR}/sty/SetFormat.sty
   310вҶ’в”Ӯ  в”ңв”Җ 1_loyaut.sty -> ${ABS_SRC_DIR}/sty/SetLoyaut.sty
   311вҶ’в”Ӯ  в”ңв”Җ 2_commands.sty -> ${ABS_SRC_DIR}/sty/SetCommands.sty
   312вҶ’в”Ӯ  в”ңв”Җ 3_units.sty -> ${ABS_SRC_DIR}/sty/SetUnits.sty
   313вҶ’в”Ӯ  в”ңв”Җ 4_biber.sty
   314вҶ’в”Ӯ  в”ңв”Җ 5_profiles.sty -> ${ABS_SRC_DIR}/sty/SetProfiles.sty
   315вҶ’в”Ӯ  в”ңв”Җ 6_headers.sty -> ${ABS_SRC_DIR}/sty/SetHeaders.sty
   316вҶ’в”Ӯ  в””в”Җ title.tex -> ${ABS_SRC_DIR}/templates/title.tex
   317вҶ’в”ңв”Җ pro
   318вҶ’в”ңв”Җ config.yaml
   319вҶ’в”ңв”Җ '{MAIN_CODE}.tex'
   320вҶ’в””в”Җ README.md
   321вҶ’```

   323вҶ’## Lectures structure
   324вҶ’
   325вҶ’Some courses combine several main topics and are grouped into a single
   326вҶ’directory.
   327вҶ’Each course has a directory with the following structure.
   328вҶ’
   329вҶ’```bash
   330вҶ’${ABS_PARENT_DIR}/00AA-Lectures
   331вҶ’в””в”Җ ${LECTURE_CODE}
   332вҶ’   в”ңв”Җ admin
   333вҶ’   в”ңв”Җ eval
   334вҶ’   в”Ӯ  в”ңв”Җ config
   335вҶ’   в”Ӯ  в”Ӯ  в”ңв”Җ 0_packages.sty -> ${ABS_SRC_DIR}/sty/SetFormatP.sty
   336вҶ’   в”Ӯ  в”Ӯ  в”ңв”Җ 1_loyaut.sty -> ${ABS_SRC_DIR}/sty/SetLoyaut.sty
   337вҶ’   в”Ӯ  в”Ӯ  в”ңв”Җ 2_commands.sty -> ${ABS_SRC_DIR}/sty/SetCommands.sty
   338вҶ’   в”Ӯ  в”Ӯ  в”ңв”Җ 2_partial.sty -> ${ABS_SRC_DIR}/sty/PartialCommands.sty
   339вҶ’   в”Ӯ  в”Ӯ  в”ңв”Җ 3_units.sty -> ${ABS_SRC_DIR}/sty/SetUnits.sty
   340вҶ’   в”Ӯ  в”Ӯ  в”ңв”Җ 4_biber-{ROOT1}.sty -> ${ABS_PARENT_DIR}/${ROOT1}/config/4_biber.sty
   341вҶ’   в”Ӯ  в”Ӯ  в”ңв”Җ 4_biber-{ROOT2}.sty -> ${ABS_PARENT_DIR}/${ROOT2}/config/4_biber.sty
   342вҶ’   в”Ӯ  в”Ӯ  в”ңв”Җ 5_profiles.sty -> ${ABS_SRC_DIR}/sty/SetProfiles.sty
   343вҶ’   в”Ӯ  в”Ӯ  в””в”Җ 6_headers.sty -> ${ABS_SRC_DIR}/sty/SetHeaders.sty
   344вҶ’   в”Ӯ  в”ңв”Җ img
   345вҶ’   в”Ӯ  в”Ӯ  в”ңв”Җ '{BOOK_REFERENCE}' -> ${ABS_SRC_DIR}/00II-ImagesFigures/${BOOK_REFERENCE}
   346вҶ’   в”Ӯ  в”Ӯ  в””в”Җ own
   347вҶ’   в”Ӯ  в””в”Җ 'T{TN:02d}'
   348вҶ’   в”Ӯ     в””в”Җ '{BOOK_REFERENCE}-C{ch:02d}' -> ${ABS_PARENT_DIR}/00EE-ExamplesExercises/er-${BOOK_REFERENCE}/${BOOK_REFERENCE}-C${ch:02ed}
   349вҶ’   в”ңв”Җ press
   350вҶ’   в”Ӯ  в”ңв”Җ config
   351вҶ’   в”Ӯ  в”Ӯ  в”ңв”Җ 0_packages.sty -> ${ABS_SRC_DIR}/sty/SetFormatP.sty
   352вҶ’   в”Ӯ  в”Ӯ  в”ңв”Җ 1_loyaut.sty -> ${ABS_SRC_DIR}/sty/SetLoyaut.sty
   353вҶ’   в”Ӯ  в”Ӯ  в”ңв”Җ 2_commands.sty -> ${ABS_SRC_DIR}/sty/SetCommands.sty
   354вҶ’   в”Ӯ  в”Ӯ  в”ңв”Җ 3_units.sty -> ${ABS_SRC_DIR}/sty/SetUnits.sty
   355вҶ’   в”Ӯ  в”Ӯ  в”ңв”Җ '4_biber-{LECTURE_CODE}.sty'
   356вҶ’   в”Ӯ  в”Ӯ  в”ңв”Җ '4_biber-{ROOT1}.sty' -> ${ABS_PARENT_DIR}/${ROOT1}/config/4_biber.sty
   357вҶ’   в”Ӯ  в”Ӯ  в”ңв”Җ '4_biber-{ROOT2}.sty' -> ${ABS_PARENT_DIR}/${ROOT2}/config/4_biber.sty
   358вҶ’   в”Ӯ  в”Ӯ  в”ңв”Җ 5_profiles.sty -> ${ABS_SRC_DIR}/sty/SetProfiles.sty
   359вҶ’   в”Ӯ  в”Ӯ  в”ңв”Җ 6_headers.sty -> ${ABS_SRC_DIR}/sty/SetHeaders.sty
   360вҶ’   в”Ӯ  в”Ӯ  в””в”Җ title.tex -> ${ABS_SRC_DIR}/templates/title.tex
   361вҶ’   в”Ӯ  в”ңв”Җ bib
   362вҶ’   в”Ӯ  в”Ӯ  в”ңв”Җ '{ROOT1}' -> ${ABS_PARENT_DIR}/${ROOT1}/bib
   363вҶ’   в”Ӯ  в”Ӯ  в””в”Җ '{ROOT2}' -> ${ABS_PARENT_DIR}/${ROOT2}/bib
   364вҶ’   в”Ӯ  в”ңв”Җ img
   365вҶ’   в”Ӯ  в”Ӯ  в”ңв”Җ '{ROOT1}' -> ${ABS_PARENT_DIR}/${ROOT1}/img
   366вҶ’   в”Ӯ  в”Ӯ  в”ңв”Җ '{ROOT2}' -> ${ABS_PARENT_DIR}/${ROOT2}/img
   367вҶ’   в”Ӯ  в”Ӯ  в””в”Җ own
   368вҶ’   в”Ӯ  в”ңв”Җ 'T{TN:02d}'
   369вҶ’   в”Ӯ  в”Ӯ  в”ңв”Җ '{ROOT1}-C{ch:02d}S{sec}' -> ${ABS_PROJECT_DIR1}/tex/C${ch:02d}S${sec}/
   370вҶ’   в”Ӯ  в””в”Җ 'T{TN:02d}'.tex
   371вҶ’   в””в”Җ config.yaml
   372вҶ’```

   417вҶ’```
   418вҶ’
   419вҶ’De manera que cada `#` representa un nГәmero las letras `AA` deben ser
   420вҶ’sustituidas
   421вҶ’Las palabra `Name` debe ser sustituido.
   422вҶ’Las letras `T`, `C` y `S` deben mantenerse.
   423вҶ’
   424вҶ’AdemГЎs la variable `{##AA}` debe ser lo que se indica en los primeros 4
   425вҶ’caracteres de la variable `{##AA-Name}`
   426вҶ’
   427вҶ’Necesito un scrip en bash que solicite el nГәmero de 2 dГӯgitos que acompaГұa
   428вҶ’el `{##AA-Name}` y el `{##AA}`, que pida las dos letras que se deben cambiar
   429вҶ’por `AA`, que pida el nombre del directorio principal que se debe colocar en
   430вҶ’lugar de `Name`.
   431вҶ’Que solicite la cantidad de temas a crear.
   432вҶ’La cantidad de temas a crear es un nГәmero entero.
   433вҶ’
   434вҶ’Se debe crear cada carpeta, comenzando por `{##AA-Name}` pero empleando
   435вҶ’los valores ingresados por el usuario.
   436вҶ’Las carpetas y archivos asociados a la variable `{C##S##}`, `{bookName}` y
   437вҶ’`{topic01}` deben ignorarse,
   438вҶ’estas carpetas y archivos las crearГЎ otro script.
   439вҶ’
   440вҶ’TambiГ©n se debe ignorar la craeaciГіn de los directorios `{T##}`
   441вҶ’
   442вҶ’Se debe una copia del archivo `${ABS_SRC_DIR}/templates/TNN.tex`
   443вҶ’con el nombre `T##.tex` para cada nГәmero desde el `01` hasta el nГәmero
   444вҶ’indicado.
   445вҶ’Note que todos los nГәmeros son enteros y se escriben con dos dГӯgitos,
   446вҶ’rellenando con cero a la izquierda para nГәmeros entre el 1 y el 9.
   447вҶ’
   448вҶ’Luego debe crear un soft link para cara archivo que estГЎ seguido por los
   449вҶ’caracteres `->`, donde lo primero es el nombre del archivo y
   450вҶ’lo que sigue de esos caracteres es path absoluto al archivo que se debe
   451вҶ’referenciar.
   452вҶ’
   453вҶ’Debe crear una copia de `${ABS_SRC_DIR}/templates/00AA.tex` con el nombre
   454вҶ’correcto `##AA.tex` empleado los valores ingresados por el usuario.
   455вҶ’
   456вҶ’Debe crear el archivo `4_biber.sty`
   457вҶ’Debe escribir dentro del archivo `4_biber.sty` el siguiente texto
   458вҶ’
   459вҶ’```tex
   460вҶ’\addbibresources{bib/}
   461вҶ’```
   462вҶ’
   463вҶ’Debe crear el archivo `README.md`
   464вҶ’
   465вҶ’Y debe escribir en el archivo, usando el formato adecuado de markdown
   466вҶ’el valor ingresado para `Name` como un header 1.
   467вҶ’
   468вҶ’Debe escribir con formato header 2 las siguientes secciones:
   469вҶ’
   470вҶ’- `Tabla de Contenidos`
   471вҶ’- `DistribuciГіn de temas en el curso`
   472вҶ’- `BibliografГӯa`
   473вҶ’- `Pendientes`
   474вҶ’
   475вҶ’En la secciГіn de `Tabla de contenidos` se debe emplear algГәn mecanismo de
   476вҶ’markdown para autogenerar un Гӯndice.
   477вҶ’Se puede usar la versiГіn de markdown que emplea github.com
   478вҶ’
   479вҶ’En la secciГіn de `DistribuciГіn de temas en el curso` se debe escribir una
   480вҶ’lista no enumerada donde cada item corresponda con el nombre de todos los
   481вҶ’archivos creados con el formato `T##.tex` pero sin incluir los caracteres
   482вҶ’`.tex`
   483вҶ’
   484вҶ’En la secciГіn de `Pendientes` debe iniciar una todo list con el formato
   485вҶ’adecuado para que presente como lista de pendientes indicando los siguientes
   486вҶ’items
   487вҶ’
   488вҶ’- Agregar libros y cГіdigos a `README.md`.
   489вҶ’- Crear carpetas con el link adecuado por cada libro tanto en `img/`
   490вҶ’  como en `eval/TNN/`.
   491вҶ’- Crear carpetas de las secciones correspondientes al curso.
   492вҶ’

1вҶ’# Work Flow Project
     2вҶ’
     3вҶ’This package contains a set of scripts that I use form writing my tesis,
     4вҶ’and work with latex.
     5вҶ’
     6вҶ’## Packages
     7вҶ’
     8вҶ’### lectkit
     9вҶ’
    10вҶ’This group of python scripts are simple one file action that allows to make
    11вҶ’interactions with files.
    12вҶ’
    13вҶ’#### CleTA - Clean Tex Auxiliary files
    14вҶ’
    15вҶ’This script remove common auxiliary files used by $\LaTeX$
    16вҶ’
    17вҶ’#### NoFi - Notes to files
    18вҶ’
    19вҶ’This script takes a plain tex file and creates subfiles for $\LaTeX$ to input.
    20вҶ’
    21вҶ’Use the flag '%>' to define the 'path/to/file/to/make.tex' for create a new
    22вҶ’$\LaTeX$ with the contents until the flag '%>END'.
    23вҶ’
    24вҶ’##### Example
    25вҶ’
    26вҶ’'''tex
    27вҶ’%>tex/C1/C1S1-001-file.tex
    28вҶ’This lines are going to be copied to the file C1S1-001-file.tex at the
    29вҶ’directory ./tex/C1
    30вҶ’%>END
    31вҶ’This line will be ignored
    32вҶ’'''
    33вҶ’
    34вҶ’##### Recommendation
    35вҶ’
    36вҶ’Create a $\LaTeX$ file that input the plain tex file to compile as writing.
    37вҶ’
    38вҶ’#### CreTE - Create Text Exercises
    39вҶ’
    40вҶ’This script create all the files for exercises for a references book.
    41вҶ’It uses a [json structure](Json Book-Exercises Structure) for each book.
    42вҶ’You can define
    43вҶ’
    44вҶ’##### Functions
    45вҶ’
    46вҶ’###### init_books()
    47вҶ’
    48вҶ’Create a global storage file
    49вҶ’
    50вҶ’###### add_book(book_info)
    51вҶ’
    52вҶ’Append a specified [book structure](Json Book-Exercises Structure) to the
    53вҶ’global storage file
    54вҶ’
    55вҶ’###### create_solution_file( start=1, end=1, ch=1, sec='01', book, verbose=2)
    56вҶ’
    57вҶ’Require that the 'name=book' exists on the 'books.json' file from
    58вҶ’'~.config/crete' directory.
    59вҶ’
    60вҶ’###### exercises_file_content(ch, idx, book)
    61вҶ’
    62вҶ’Returns a string formatted with the contents of each exercise file.
    63вҶ’
    64вҶ’##### Json Book-Exercises Structure
    65вҶ’
    66вҶ’```json
    67вҶ’{
    68вҶ’  "library": [
    69вҶ’    {
    70вҶ’       "name": "FirstAuthorLastname",
    71вҶ’      "code": "MDS_code",
    72вҶ’      "distro": [[ch,"sec",ini,end],]
    73вҶ’    },
    74вҶ’  ]
    75вҶ’}
    76вҶ’```
    77вҶ’
    78вҶ’### ITeP - Init Tex Project
    79вҶ’
    80вҶ’This scrip creates the structure for a $\LaTeX$ project.
    81вҶ’The actual structure is on [structure files](./docs/ADR/structure.md).
    82вҶ’
    83вҶ’#### To do
    84вҶ’
    85вҶ’- Entries point: CLI, `config.yaml`
    86вҶ’- Files per global structure that manage the main directory:
    87вҶ’  `lecture.py`, `topic.py`
    88вҶ’- Need a load `config.yaml` and in the file it must indicate the corresponding
    89вҶ’  manager.
    90вҶ’- Each structure files parse the corresponding `config.yaml`
    91вҶ’- `set_up_config.py` creates a new `config.yaml`
    92вҶ’- `init_structure.py` load up structure and creates directories and links
    93вҶ’- `relink.py`
    94вҶ’
    95вҶ’### PRISMAreview
    96вҶ’
    97вҶ’This code is on pause. Another repository is developing it
    98вҶ’
    99вҶ’#### NoRI - Note Reference Insertion
   100вҶ’
   101вҶ’Script that search for study summary files, fallowing an specific structure
   102вҶ’on [YAML](https://yaml.org/) file format, and look for notes on the files.
   103вҶ’It returns a string output to [Neovim](https://neovim.io/), the note structure
   104вҶ’on the summary file indicates whether is paraphrase o verbatim, so that inset
   105вҶ’a $\LaTeX$ quotation reference respectively.
   106вҶ’
   107вҶ’##### lib2bib
   108вҶ’
   109вҶ’This script compares all files on lib directory with entries
   110вҶ’on master.bib file. If a document on lib directory don't
   111вҶ’have a bib entries it proceed to create one.
   112вҶ’
   113вҶ’##### PRISMA 2020 - Register Structure
   114вҶ’
   115вҶ’We use [PRIMA 2020](http://www.prisma-statement.org) for a
   116вҶ’systematic review of the scientific article. This protocol
   117вҶ’establishes the items to record for each Article Register.
   118вҶ’This script interacts with a Data Base where Registers are
   119вҶ’recorded.
   120вҶ’
   121вҶ’###### Documentation
   122вҶ’
   123вҶ’This library interacts via CLI and ask to input item by item,
   124вҶ’then send the information to the DataBase.
   125вҶ’
   126вҶ’###### To do list
   127вҶ’
   128вҶ’- An interaction to the data base for Summary Notes creation.
   129вҶ’- Bib automatic update.
   130вҶ’
   131вҶ’##### Summary Notes structure
   132вҶ’
   133вҶ’The summary consist of easy access files that provides the
   134вҶ’notes, connections, ideas and other kinds of information
   135вҶ’useful when writing essays.
   136вҶ’
   137вҶ’```yaml
   138вҶ’%YAML 1.2
   139вҶ’---
   140вҶ’Authors:
   141вҶ’  - []
   142вҶ’  - []
   143вҶ’
   144вҶ’Title: |
   145вҶ’  The title
   146вҶ’
   147вҶ’Bib: | # citation-key defined on .bib file
   148вҶ’  citation-key
   149вҶ’
   150вҶ’Keywords:
   151вҶ’  Article:
   152вҶ’    - word 1
   153вҶ’    - word 2
   154вҶ’  Own:
   155вҶ’  Nucleus:
   156вҶ’
   157вҶ’Objective: |
   158вҶ’  The objective
   159вҶ’
   160вҶ’Definitions:
   161вҶ’  Name:
   162вҶ’    id:
   163вҶ’    def: |
   164вҶ’      the definition
   165вҶ’    ideas: # list of personal conclusions or connections
   166вҶ’      - |
   167вҶ’        first idea or conclusion
   168вҶ’    use: |
   169вҶ’      examples or descriptions
   170вҶ’    cite: # references made by authors on the source
   171вҶ’      "[n],[n+2-n+4]"
   172вҶ’
   173вҶ’Key-Ideas:
   174вҶ’
   175вҶ’Conclusions:
   176вҶ’
   177вҶ’References: # Source references
   178вҶ’  n: the n reference
   179вҶ’  n+2: other...
   180вҶ’```
   181вҶ’
   182вҶ’##### Dependencies
   183вҶ’
   184вҶ’- [Inkscape figure manager](https://github.com/gillescastel/latex-snippets)
   185вҶ’- [`rofi`](https://github.com/davatorium/rofi) for a selection dialog
   186вҶ’

    24вҶ’class Main_topic(models.Model):
    25вҶ’    name: str
    26вҶ’    code: str
    27вҶ’    ddc_mds: str
    28вҶ’
    29вҶ’    class Meta:

    37вҶ’
    38вҶ’class Topic(models.Model):

    40вҶ’    name: str

    43вҶ’
    44вҶ’class Book(models.Model):
    45вҶ’    name: str

    48вҶ’
    49вҶ’
    50вҶ’class Author(models.Model):
    51вҶ’    first_name = models.CharField(max_length=40)

    53вҶ’    alias = models.SmallIntegerField(default=0, blank=True, null=True)

    57вҶ’
    58вҶ’    class Meta:

    70вҶ’author_type_list = {

1вҶ’from dataclasses import is_dataclass
     2вҶ’from pathlib import Path
     3вҶ’from typing import Any, Dict
     4вҶ’from itep.structure import ProjectStructure
     5вҶ’from itep.utils import load_yaml, write_yaml
     6вҶ’from datetime import date, datetime
     7вҶ’
     8вҶ’
     9вҶ’def load_config(file: str):
    10вҶ’    cfg_dict = load_yaml(file)
    11вҶ’    return ProjectStructure(**cfg_dict)
    12вҶ’
    13вҶ’
    14вҶ’def _to_dict(key: str, data: Any) -> Dict[str, str]:
    15вҶ’    thisD = {}
    16вҶ’    if isinstance(data, (int, str, Path)):
    17вҶ’        thisD[key] = str(data)
    18вҶ’    elif isinstance(data, (date, datetime)):
    19вҶ’        thisD[key] = data.isoformat()
    20вҶ’    elif isinstance(data, list):
    21вҶ’        temp = []
    22вҶ’        for ndata in data:
    23вҶ’            if is_dataclass(ndata) or isinstance(ndata, dict):
    24вҶ’                temp2 = []
    25вҶ’                for nnkey, nndata in dict(ndata).items():
    26вҶ’                    temp2.append(
    27вҶ’                        (f"\t{k}: {v}\n\t" for k, v in _to_dict(nnkey, nndata).items())
    28вҶ’                    )
    29вҶ’                temp.append("\n\t- ".join(temp2))
    30вҶ’            else:
    31вҶ’                temp.append(str(ndata))
    32вҶ’        thisD[key] = "\n\t- ".join(temp)
    33вҶ’    elif is_dataclass(data):
    34вҶ’        temp = {}
    35вҶ’        if hasattr(data, "structure_repr"):
    36вҶ’            temp = data.structure_repr()
    37вҶ’        else:
    38вҶ’            for nkey, ndata in dict(data).items():
    39вҶ’                temp.update(_to_dict(nkey, ndata))
    40вҶ’        thisD[key] = temp
    41вҶ’    return thisD
    42вҶ’
    43вҶ’
    44вҶ’def save_config(cfg: ProjectStructure, path: Path):
    45вҶ’    data = {}
    46вҶ’    for atrr, info in dict(cfg).items():
    47вҶ’        data.update(_to_dict(atrr, info))
    48вҶ’    write_yaml(path, data)
    49вҶ’    pass
    50вҶ’

1вҶ’from itep.structure import MetaData, ConfigType, Topic, Book
     2вҶ’from itep.defaults import DEF_ABS_SRC_DIR, DEF_ABS_PARENT_DIR
     3вҶ’from itep.utils import load_yaml
     4вҶ’import click
     5вҶ’from enum import EnumType
     6вҶ’from pathlib import Path
     7вҶ’
     8вҶ’# -------------------- Utilidades --------------------
     9вҶ’
    10вҶ’
    11вҶ’def safe_symlink(target: Path, link_path: Path):
    12вҶ’    ensure_dir(link_path.parent)
    13вҶ’    if link_path.is_symlink() or link_path.exists():
    14вҶ’        if link_path.is_symlink():
    15вҶ’            try:
    16вҶ’                current = link_path.readlink()
    17вҶ’            except OSError:
    18вҶ’                current = None
    19вҶ’            if current == target:
    20вҶ’                return False
    21вҶ’            try:
    22вҶ’                link_path.unlink()
    23вҶ’            except OSError:
    24вҶ’                pass
    25вҶ’        else:
    26вҶ’            return False
    27вҶ’    link_path.symlink_to(target)
    28вҶ’    return True
    29вҶ’
    30вҶ’
    31вҶ’def create_config_links(
    32вҶ’    target_dir: Path,
    33вҶ’    abs_src_dir: Path,
    34вҶ’    links_relations: dict,
    35вҶ’    config_type: EnumType,
    36вҶ’    src_type: str = "sty",
    37вҶ’):
    38вҶ’    if config_type != EnumType:
    39вҶ’        target_dir = target_dir / config_type.value
    40вҶ’    for rel, src_file in links_relations.items():
    41вҶ’        link = target_dir / "config" / rel
    42вҶ’        target = abs_src_dir / src_type / src_file
    43вҶ’        safe_symlink(target, link)
    44вҶ’
    45вҶ’
    46вҶ’def create_topics_links(
    47вҶ’    target_dir: Path,
    48вҶ’    abs_src_dir: Path,
    49вҶ’    links_relations: dict,
    50вҶ’):
    51вҶ’    for rel, src_file in links_relations.items():
    52вҶ’        link = target_dir / rel
    53вҶ’        target = abs_src_dir / src_file
    54вҶ’        safe_symlink(target, link)
    55вҶ’
    56вҶ’
    57вҶ’def create_links(link_dir: Path, relations: dict[str, Path]):
    58вҶ’    for link_file, target in relations.items():
    59вҶ’        link = link_dir / link_file
    60вҶ’        safe_symlink(target, link)
    61вҶ’
    62вҶ’
    63вҶ’# -------------------- CLI --------------------
    64вҶ’
    65вҶ’
    66вҶ’@click.command("relink", help="Recrea symlinks usando config.yaml")
    67вҶ’@click.argument("project_dir", required=False)
    68вҶ’@click.option(
    69вҶ’    "--parent", "abs_parent_dir", default=DEF_ABS_PARENT_DIR, show_default=True
    70вҶ’)
    71вҶ’@click.option("--src", "abs_src_dir", default=DEF_ABS_SRC_DIR, show_default=True)
    72вҶ’def cli(project_dir, abs_parent_dir, abs_src_dir):
    73вҶ’    target_dir = Path(project_dir).resolve() if project_dir else Path.cwd()
    74вҶ’    cfg = load_yaml(target_dir / "config.yaml")
    75вҶ’    if not cfg:
    76вҶ’        raise click.ClickException("No se pudo leer config.yaml")
    77вҶ’    data = MetaData(cfg.get("data"))
    78вҶ’    abs_project = Path(data.get("abs_project_dir", abs_parent_dir)).resolve()
    79вҶ’    abs_parent = Path(data.get("abs_prarent_dir", abs_parent_dir)).resolve()
    80вҶ’    abs_src = Path(data.get("abs_src_dir", abs_src_dir)).resolve()
    81вҶ’
    82вҶ’    topic_list = []
    83вҶ’    books_links_relations = {}
    84вҶ’    for topic_key, topic_value in cfg["topics"].items():
    85вҶ’        for chapter in topic_value["chapters"]:
    86вҶ’            if chapter[:3] in cfg["books"]:
    87вҶ’                book_info = Book(**cfg["books"][chapter[:3]])
    88вҶ’                chapter_src = "{}/{}".format(
    89вҶ’                    book_info.get_dir_name(),
    90вҶ’                    chapter[3:],
    91вҶ’                )
    92вҶ’                chapter_link = "{}-{}/{}-{}-{}".format(
    93вҶ’                    topic_key[1:],
    94вҶ’                    topic_value["name"],
    95вҶ’                    book_info.code[:3],
    96вҶ’                    book_info.name.lower(),
    97вҶ’                    chapter[3:],
    98вҶ’                )
    99вҶ’                books_links_relations[chapter_link] = chapter_src
   100вҶ’        topic_list.append(Topic(topic_value))
   101вҶ’
   102вҶ’    for config_type in ConfigType:
   103вҶ’        if config_type.value in cfg.keys():
   104вҶ’            relations = cfg[config_type.value]["config_files"]
   105вҶ’            create_config_links(abs_project, abs_src, relations, config_type)
   106вҶ’        if config_type == ConfigType.EVAL:
   107вҶ’            eval_topics_path = abs_project / "eval"
   108вҶ’            eval_src_path = abs_parent / "00EE-ExamplesExercises"
   109вҶ’            create_topics_links(
   110вҶ’                eval_topics_path,
   111вҶ’                eval_src_path,
   112вҶ’                books_links_relations,
   113вҶ’            )
   114вҶ’
   115вҶ’    click.echo("Symlinks recreados segГәn config.yaml.")
   116вҶ’
   117вҶ’
   118вҶ’if __name__ == "__main__":
   119вҶ’    cli()
   120вҶ’

1вҶ’# src/itep/structures.py
     2вҶ’from __future__ import annotations
     3вҶ’from dataclasses import dataclass, field, fields

     8вҶ’
     9вҶ’
    10вҶ’from itep.utils import code_format, ensure_dir

    12вҶ’from appfunc.options import select_enum_type

    14вҶ’
    15вҶ’# --- Constantes por defecto ---

    18вҶ’class FriendlyEnumMeta(EnumType):
    19вҶ’    def __call__(cls: EnumType, value, *args, **kwargs):
    20вҶ’        try:
    21вҶ’            return super().__call__(value, *args, **kwargs)
    22вҶ’        except ValueError as e:
    23вҶ’            valid = ", ".join([m.value for m in cls])
    24вҶ’            raise ValueError(
    25вҶ’                f"'{value}' no es un valor vГЎlido para {cls.__name__}. "
    26вҶ’                f"Valores permitidos: {valid}"
    27вҶ’            ) from e
    28вҶ’
    29вҶ’
    30вҶ’class ConfigType(StrEnum, metaclass=FriendlyEnumMeta):
    31вҶ’    BASE = "base"
    32вҶ’    EVAL = "eval"
    33вҶ’    PRESS = "press"
    34вҶ’
    35вҶ’
    36вҶ’class Institution(StrEnum, metaclass=FriendlyEnumMeta):
    37вҶ’    UCR = "UCR"
    38вҶ’    FIDE = "UFide"
    39вҶ’    UCIMED = "UCIMED"
    40вҶ’
    41вҶ’
    42вҶ’class GeneralDirectory(StrEnum, metaclass=FriendlyEnumMeta):
    43вҶ’    LEC = "00AA-Lectures"
    44вҶ’    IMG = "00II-ImagesFigures"
    45вҶ’    BIB = "00BB-Library"
    46вҶ’    EXE = "00EE-ExamplesExercises"
    47вҶ’
    48вҶ’
    49вҶ’# ==================== Dataclass base ====================
    50вҶ’
    51вҶ’
    52вҶ’@dataclass
    53вҶ’class ProjectModel:
    54вҶ’    name: str = field(default_factory=str)
    55вҶ’    parent: Path = field(default_factory=Path)
    56вҶ’    root: str = field(default_factory=str)
    57вҶ’    patterns: Dict[str, str] = field(default_factory=dict)
    58вҶ’    main_topics: Path = field(default_factory=Path)
    59вҶ’    tree: List[str] = field(default_factory=list)
    60вҶ’    links: Dict[str, Dict[str, str]] = field(default_factory=dict)
    61вҶ’
    62вҶ’    def __iter__(self):
    63вҶ’        yield from ((f.name, getattr(self, f.name)) for f in fields(self))
    64вҶ’
    65вҶ’
    66вҶ’@dataclass
    67вҶ’class WeekDay:
    68вҶ’    week_number: int = field(
    69вҶ’        metadata={
    70вҶ’            "input": spec(
    71вҶ’                "Enter week number",
    72вҶ’                r"[0-9]{1,2}",
    73вҶ’                int,
    74вҶ’            )
    75вҶ’        }
    76вҶ’    )
    77вҶ’    lecture_day: int = field(
    78вҶ’        metadata={
    79вҶ’            "input": spec(
    80вҶ’                "Enter weed day assosiated (Mon=1,...,Sat=6)",
    81вҶ’                r"[1-6]",
    82вҶ’                int,
    83вҶ’            )
    84вҶ’        }
    85вҶ’    )
    86вҶ’    first_monday: date = field(
    87вҶ’        metadata={
    88вҶ’            "input": spec(
    89вҶ’                "Enter first monday for the lecture cycle as ISO (YYYY-MM-DD)",
    90вҶ’                r"([0-9]{4})-(0[1-9]|1[0-2])-(0[1-9]|[12][0-9]|3[01])",
    91вҶ’                date.fromisoformat,
    92вҶ’            )
    93вҶ’        }
    94вҶ’    )
    95вҶ’    init_time: int = field(
    96вҶ’        metadata={
    97вҶ’            "input": spec(
    98вҶ’                "Enter the scheldule initial hour (0-23)",
    99вҶ’                r"([01]?\d|2[0-3])",
   100вҶ’                int,
   101вҶ’            )
   102вҶ’        }
   103вҶ’    )
   104вҶ’    tmz: int = field(
   105вҶ’        metadata={
   106вҶ’            "input": spec(
   107вҶ’                "Enter time zone in range [-24,+24]",
   108вҶ’                r"[+-]?([0-9]|[1][0-9]|2[0-4])",
   109вҶ’                int,
   110вҶ’            )
   111вҶ’        }
   112вҶ’    )
   113вҶ’    code: str = field(init=False)
   114вҶ’    day_date: datetime = field(init=False)
   115вҶ’
   116вҶ’    def __post_init__(self):
   117вҶ’        self.day_date = datetime.fromisocalendar(
   118вҶ’            self.first_monday.isocalendar()[0],
   119вҶ’            self.first_monday.isocalendar()[1] + self.week_number,
   120вҶ’            self.lecture_day,
   121вҶ’        ).replace(
   122вҶ’            hour=self.init_time,
   123вҶ’            tzinfo=timezone(timedelta(hours=self.tmz)),
   124вҶ’        )
   125вҶ’        self.code = code_format("W", self.week_number)
   126вҶ’        self.code += code_format("L", self.lecture_day)
   127вҶ’        self.code += f"D{self.day_date.isoformat()}"
   128вҶ’
   129вҶ’    def __iter__(self):
   130вҶ’        yield from ((f.name, getattr(self, f.name)) for f in fields(self))
   131вҶ’
   132вҶ’    def __str__(self):
   133вҶ’        return self.code
   134вҶ’
   135вҶ’    def project_repr(self):
   136вҶ’        return self.code
   137вҶ’
   138вҶ’    @classmethod
   139вҶ’    def fromisoformat(
   140вҶ’        cls,
   141вҶ’        date_str: str,
   142вҶ’        init_time: int,
   143вҶ’        tmz: int,
   144вҶ’        first: date,
   145вҶ’    ) -> WeekDay:
   146вҶ’        assigned = date.fromisoformat(date_str)
   147вҶ’        week_number = assigned.isocalendar().week - first.isocalendar().week
   148вҶ’        lecture_day = assigned.isoweekday()
   149вҶ’        return cls(week_number, lecture_day, first, init_time, tmz)
   150вҶ’
   151вҶ’
   152вҶ’@dataclass
   153вҶ’class ConfigData:
   154вҶ’    name: str
   155вҶ’    directory: str
   156вҶ’    src: str
   157вҶ’    termination: str
   158вҶ’    number: int | None
   159вҶ’
   160вҶ’    def __iter__(self):
   161вҶ’        yield from ((f.name, getattr(self, f.name)) for f in fields(self))
   162вҶ’
   163вҶ’    def get_relation(self):
   164вҶ’        target_file = f"{self.directory}/{self.src}.{self.termination}"
   165вҶ’        if self.number:
   166вҶ’            link_file = f"{self.number}-{self.name}.{self.termination}"
   167вҶ’        else:
   168вҶ’            link_file = f"{self.name}.{self.termination}"
   169вҶ’        return {link_file: target_file}
   170вҶ’
   171вҶ’    @classmethod
   172вҶ’    def from_relations(cls, link: str, target: str) -> ConfigData:
   173вҶ’        link_list = link.split("-")
   174вҶ’        number = None
   175вҶ’        if len(link_list) == 1:
   176вҶ’            pass
   177вҶ’        elif len(link_list) == 2:
   178вҶ’            number = int(link_list[0])
   179вҶ’            link = link_list[1]
   180вҶ’        else:
   181вҶ’            msn = f"invalid link file name {link}"
   182вҶ’            raise ValueError(msn)
   183вҶ’
   184вҶ’        name, termination = link.split(".")
   185вҶ’
   186вҶ’        directory, target = target.split("/")
   187вҶ’        src, term_test = target.split(".")
   188вҶ’
   189вҶ’        if termination != term_test:
   190вҶ’            raise ValueError("link and target have diferent termination")
   191вҶ’
   192вҶ’        return cls(name, directory, src, termination, number)
   193вҶ’
   194вҶ’

   196вҶ’class MetaData:
   197вҶ’    # absolute routes

   199вҶ’    abs_src_dir: Path = DEF_ABS_SRC_DIR

   404вҶ’
   405вҶ’    code: str = field(default_factory=str)
   406вҶ’    name: str = field(default_factory=str)
   407вҶ’    project_type: ProjectModel = field(default_factory=ProjectModel)
   408вҶ’    root: str = field(init=False)
   409вҶ’    data: MetaData = field(default_factory=MetaData)
   410вҶ’    admin: Admin | None = field(default=None)
   411вҶ’    main_topic_root: List[str] = field(default_factory=list)
   412вҶ’    books: Dict[str, Book] = field(default_factory=dict)
   413вҶ’    topics: Dict[str, Topic] = field(default_factory=dict)
   414вҶ’    configs: Dict[str, List[ConfigData]] = field(default_factory=dict)
   415вҶ’
   416вҶ’    def __post_init__(self):
   417вҶ’        institution = None
   418вҶ’        if self.admin:
   419вҶ’            institution = self.admin.institution.value
   420вҶ’        self.root = self.project_type.root.format(
   421вҶ’            name=self.name,
   422вҶ’            code=self.code,
   423вҶ’            institution=institution,
   424вҶ’        )
   425вҶ’
   426вҶ’    def __iter__(self):
   427вҶ’        yield from ((f.name, getattr(self, f.name)) for f in fields(self))
   428вҶ’
   429вҶ’    def init_directories(self) -> None:
   430вҶ’        for directory in self.project_type.tree:
   431вҶ’            if "{" in directory:
   432вҶ’                for idx, topic in self.topics.items():
   433вҶ’                    ensure_dir(
   434вҶ’                        self.data.abs_parent_dir
   435вҶ’                        / self.root
   436вҶ’                        / directory.format(t_idx=idx, t_name=topic.name),
   437вҶ’                        forced=True,
   438вҶ’                    )
   439вҶ’
   440вҶ’            else:
   441вҶ’                ensure_dir(
   442вҶ’                    self.data.abs_parent_dir / self.root / directory,
   443вҶ’                    forced=True,
   444вҶ’                )
   445вҶ’

1вҶ’# src/itep/utils.py
     2вҶ’from pathlib import Path
     3вҶ’from typing import Any, Dict, Protocol, Self, Union, List, Tuple
     4вҶ’import yaml
     5вҶ’
     6вҶ’from appfunc.iofunc import gather_input
     7вҶ’from appfunc.options import select_enum_type
     8вҶ’
     9вҶ’
    10вҶ’def ensure_dir(
    11вҶ’    path: Path,
    12вҶ’    name: str = "directory",
    13вҶ’    forced: bool = False,
    14вҶ’) -> None:
    15вҶ’    if not path.exists() and not forced:
    16вҶ’        print(f"Your {name} path:\n\t{path}\ndon't exists.")
    17вҶ’        ans = input("Do you want to create it? (Y,n): ").lower() or "y"
    18вҶ’        if ans == "y":
    19вҶ’            path.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    20вҶ’        else:
    21вҶ’            print("We can't procced with out this directory.")
    22вҶ’            ans = input("Do you want to abort (Y,n) ") or "y"
    23вҶ’            if ans == "y":
    24вҶ’                quit()
    25вҶ’    elif not path.exists() and forced:
    26вҶ’        path.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    27вҶ’
    28вҶ’
    29вҶ’def code_format(
    30вҶ’    ind: str,
    31вҶ’    sec: Union[str, int],
    32вҶ’    max: int = 2,
    33вҶ’) -> str:
    34вҶ’    """sec: int 1..99 вҶ’ '01'..'99'; especiales 'A0'/'D0' se respetan."""
    35вҶ’    ind = ind.upper()
    36вҶ’    if isinstance(sec, int):
    37вҶ’        if sec < 0 or sec > 10**max - 1:
    38вҶ’            raise ValueError(f"sec fuera de rango (esperado 1..{10**max - 1})")
    39вҶ’        return f"{ind}{sec:0{max}d}"
    40вҶ’    sec = str(sec).upper()
    41вҶ’    if len(sec) == max:
    42вҶ’        return f"{ind}{sec}"
    43вҶ’    elif len(sec) < max:
    44вҶ’        return f"{ind}{0:0{max - len(sec)}}{sec}"
    45вҶ’    else:
    46вҶ’        raise ValueError(f"{sec}({len(sec)}) fuera del rango esperado: {max}")
    47вҶ’
    48вҶ’
    49вҶ’class DefinedByFiles(Protocol):
    50вҶ’    @classmethod
    51вҶ’    def from_directory(cls, path: Path) -> Self:
    52вҶ’        return cls()
    53вҶ’
    54вҶ’
    55вҶ’def add_to_reference_dict(
    56вҶ’    object: DefinedByFiles,
    57вҶ’    path: Path,
    58вҶ’    mark: str,
    59вҶ’    max: int = 2,
    60вҶ’    object_dict: Dict[str, DefinedByFiles] = {},
    61вҶ’) -> Dict[str, DefinedByFiles]:
    62вҶ’    enough = False
    63вҶ’    while not enough:
    64вҶ’        idx = len(object_dict) + 1
    65вҶ’        ref = code_format(mark, idx, max)
    66вҶ’        object_dict[ref] = object.from_directory(path)
    67вҶ’        if None in object_dict.values():
    68вҶ’            return {}
    69вҶ’        print(f"Current list:\n\t>> {object_dict}")
    70вҶ’        ans = input("Want to add more? (y/N): ").lower() or "n"
    71вҶ’        if ans == "n":
    72вҶ’            enough = True
    73вҶ’    return object_dict
    74вҶ’
    75вҶ’
    76вҶ’def set_directory_list(msn: str, path: Path) -> List[str]:
    77вҶ’    dir_list = [d.name for d in path.iterdir() if d.is_dir()]
    78вҶ’    enough = False
    79вҶ’    selected_list = []
    80вҶ’    while not enough:
    81вҶ’        selection = select_enum_type(msn, dir_list)
    82вҶ’        if selection not in selected_list:
    83вҶ’            selected_list.append(selection)
    84вҶ’        print(f"Current selected directories:\n\t>> {selected_list}")
    85вҶ’        ans = input("Do you want to add more? (y/N): ").lower() or "n"
    86вҶ’        if ans == "n":
    87вҶ’            enough = True
    88вҶ’    return selected_list
    89вҶ’
    90вҶ’
    91вҶ’def load_yaml(path: Union[str, Path]) -> Dict[str, Any]:
    92вҶ’    with open(path, "r", encoding="utf-8") as f:
    93вҶ’        data = yaml.safe_load(f) or {}
    94вҶ’    if not isinstance(data, dict):
    95вҶ’        raise ValueError("The YAML file must be mapped to a dict.")
    96вҶ’    return data
    97вҶ’
    98вҶ’
    99вҶ’def write_yaml(path: Path, data: Dict) -> None:
   100вҶ’    with open(path, "w") as f:
   101вҶ’        yaml.dump(data, f, default_flow_style=False, sort_keys=False)
   102вҶ’
   103вҶ’
   104вҶ’def enter_hours(name: str) -> Tuple:
   105вҶ’    msn = f"Enter the scheldule time for {name}\n"
   106вҶ’    msn += "hour,timezone (ej: 13,-6)\n"
   107вҶ’    msn += "\t<< "
   108вҶ’    hours = gather_input(msn, "^([0-9]|[12][0-9]),([+-])([0-9]|[12][0-9])")
   109вҶ’    hour, tmz = hours.split(",")
   110вҶ’    return int(hour), int(tmz)
   111вҶ’

1вҶ’from dataclasses import dataclass, fields, is_dataclass
     2вҶ’from typing import TypeVar, Callable, Generic, Pattern, Any, List, Protocol
     3вҶ’from typing import get_args, get_origin, Union
     4вҶ’import re
     5вҶ’
     6вҶ’
     7вҶ’T = TypeVar("T")
     8вҶ’
     9вҶ’
    10вҶ’class DataclassInstance(Protocol):
    11вҶ’    __dataclass_fields__: dict[str, object]
    12вҶ’
    13вҶ’
    14вҶ’@dataclass(frozen=True)
    15вҶ’class FieldSpec(Generic[T]):
    16вҶ’    prompt: str  # mensaje a mostrar
    17вҶ’    pattern: Pattern[str]  # regex compilada
    18вҶ’    parser: Callable[[str], T]  # conversiГіn: str -> T
    19вҶ’
    20вҶ’
    21вҶ’def spec(prompt: str, rx: str, parser: Callable[[str], T]) -> FieldSpec[T]:
    22вҶ’    return FieldSpec(prompt=prompt, pattern=re.compile(rx), parser=parser)
    23вҶ’
    24вҶ’
    25вҶ’def ask(spec: FieldSpec[T]) -> T:
    26вҶ’    while True:
    27вҶ’        print(spec.prompt)
    28вҶ’        output = input("\t<< ")
    29вҶ’        if not spec.pattern.fullmatch(output):
    30вҶ’            print(f"Your input:\n\t>> {output}")
    31вҶ’            print(f"Don't match the condition: {spec.pattern}")
    32вҶ’            if (input("Want to try again? (Y/n): ").lower() or "y") != "y":
    33вҶ’                raise SystemExit(1)
    34вҶ’        try:
    35вҶ’            return spec.parser(output)
    36вҶ’        except Exception as e:
    37вҶ’            print(f"Error when parsing {output}.\n{e}")
    38вҶ’            if (input("Want to try again? (Y/n): ").lower() or "y") != "y":
    39вҶ’                raise SystemExit(1)
    40вҶ’
    41вҶ’
    42вҶ’def gather_input(
    43вҶ’    msn: str,
    44вҶ’    condition: str,
    45вҶ’) -> str:
    46вҶ’    """Function for back compatibility"""
    47вҶ’    while True:
    48вҶ’        print(msn)
    49вҶ’        output = input("\t<< ")
    50вҶ’        if re.fullmatch(condition, output):
    51вҶ’            return output
    52вҶ’        else:
    53вҶ’            print(f"Your input:\n\t>> {output}")
    54вҶ’            print(f"Don't match the condition: {condition}")
    55вҶ’            if (input("Want to try again? (Y/n): ").lower() or "y") != "y":
    56вҶ’                raise SystemExit(1)
    57вҶ’
    58вҶ’
    59вҶ’def _is_optional(tp: Any) -> bool:
    60вҶ’    return get_origin(tp) is Union and type(None) in get_args(tp)
    61вҶ’
    62вҶ’
    63вҶ’def _unwrap_optional(tp: Any) -> Any:
    64вҶ’    if not _is_optional(tp):
    65вҶ’        return tp
    66вҶ’    return next(a for a in get_args(tp) if a is not type(None))
    67вҶ’
    68вҶ’
    69вҶ’def _is_list_of_dataclass(tp: Any) -> bool:
    70вҶ’    return get_origin(tp) in (list, List) and is_dataclass(get_args(tp)[0])
    71вҶ’
    72вҶ’
    73вҶ’def _is_list(tp: Any) -> bool:
    74вҶ’    return get_origin(tp) in (list, List)
    75вҶ’
    76вҶ’
    77вҶ’# Recolector genГ©rico con soporte para Optional[Dataclass]
    78вҶ’def gather_dataclass(clas: DataclassInstance) -> DataclassInstance:
    79вҶ’    data: dict[str, Any] = {}
    80вҶ’    for f in fields(clas):
    81вҶ’        if not f.init:
    82вҶ’            continue
    83вҶ’
    84вҶ’        # 1) Si hay FieldSpec en metadata, Гәsalo
    85вҶ’        fs: FieldSpec[Any] | None = f.metadata.get("input") if f.metadata else None
    86вҶ’        if fs is not None:
    87вҶ’            data[f.name] = ask(fs)
    88вҶ’            continue
    89вҶ’
    90вҶ’        # De quГӯ en adelante no funciona
    91вҶ’        # ftype = f.type
    92вҶ’        #
    93вҶ’        # if _is_optional(ftype):
    94вҶ’        #     # 2) Optional[T] donde T es dataclass -> preguntar y construir
    95вҶ’        #     inner = _unwrap_optional(ftype)
    96вҶ’        #     if is_dataclass(inner):
    97вҶ’        #         yn = (
    98вҶ’        #             input(f"ВҝDesea capturar В«{f.name}В»? (y/N): ").strip().lower() or "n"
    99вҶ’        #         )
   100вҶ’        #         data[f.name] = gather_dataclass(inner) if yn == "y" else None
   101вҶ’        #         continue
   102вҶ’        #     else:
   103вҶ’        #         # Optional de tipo simple sin spec -> dejar None por defecto
   104вҶ’        #         data[f.name] = None
   105вҶ’        #         continue
   106вҶ’        # elif _is_list_of_dataclass(ftype):
   107вҶ’        #     # 3) List[Dataclass] -> pedir cantidad e instanciar cada elemento
   108вҶ’        #     elem_type = get_args(ftype)[0]
   109вҶ’        #     n = ask(spec(f"ВҝCuГЎntos elementos para В«{f.name}В»?", r"[0-9]{1,3}", int))
   110вҶ’        #     items = []
   111вҶ’        #     for i in range(n):
   112вҶ’        #         print(f"\nвҖ” {f.name}[{i}] вҖ”")
   113вҶ’        #         gather_fn = getattr(elem_type, "gather_info", None)
   114вҶ’        #         items.append(
   115вҶ’        #             gather_fn() if callable(gather_fn) else gather_dataclass(elem_type)
   116вҶ’        #         )
   117вҶ’        #     data[f.name] = items
   118вҶ’        #     continue
   119вҶ’        # elif _is_list(ftype):
   120вҶ’        #     # 4) List simple sin spec -> CSV rГЎpido
   121вҶ’        #     csv = ask(
   122вҶ’        #         spec(f"Ingrese CSV para В«{f.name}В» (vacГӯo = lista vacГӯa)", r".*", str)
   123вҶ’        #     )
   124вҶ’        #     data[f.name] = [t.strip() for t in csv.split(",")] if csv.strip() else []
   125вҶ’        #     continue
   126вҶ’        #
   127вҶ’        # # 5) Tipos simples sin spec -> omitir (usar default) o podrГӯas aГұadir un fallback
   128вҶ’        # # data[f.name] no se establece: dataclasses usarГЎ default/default_factory
   129вҶ’        #
   130вҶ’    return clas(**data)
   131вҶ’

1вҶ’from typing import Iterable
     2вҶ’
     3вҶ’
     4вҶ’def select_enum_type(name: str, enum_base: Iterable[str]) -> str:
     5вҶ’    selected = None
     6вҶ’    max_opt = len(enum_base)
     7вҶ’    while not selected:
     8вҶ’        print(f"Choose you {name}:")
     9вҶ’        for idx, enum_item in enumerate(enum_base):
    10вҶ’            print(f"\t{idx}: {enum_item}")
    11вҶ’        try:
    12вҶ’            print("Enter -1 to avoid selecting a topic.\n")
    13вҶ’            choice = int(input(f"Enter the number for your {name}: "))
    14вҶ’        except ValueError:
    15вҶ’            print("You must write just the option number.\nTry again.")
    16вҶ’            continue
    17вҶ’        if choice < 0:
    18вҶ’            raise StopIteration
    19вҶ’        elif choice < max_opt:
    20вҶ’            selected = list(enum_base)[choice]
    21вҶ’        else:
    22вҶ’            print(f"You must choose between [0, {max_opt - 1}].\nTry again.")
    23вҶ’    return selected
    24вҶ’

content.text:
Perfect! Now I have a comprehensive view of the project. Let me compile my findings:

## Comprehensive Exploration Report: WorkFlow Project

### 1. **Architecture Decision Record (ADR) - `docs/ADR/structure.md`**

This is a detailed specification for organizing a physics research project with:
- **Physics-focused project structure** with Spanish-language documentation and variable templates
- **Three main directory categories:**
  - Common Lectures (`00AA-Lectures`)
  - Library (`02-Library` with Dewey Decimal Classification)
  - Solved Exercises (`00EE-ExamplesExercises`)
  - Images/Figures (`00II-ImagesFigures`)
- **Main topic directory structure** including tex files, bibliography, images, and config
- **Lecture structure** with administrative, evaluation, and presentation subdirectories
- **Variables and path templates** for organizing physics courses systematically
- **Shared files** configuration for LaTeX templates and styles

---

### 2. **Main CLI Entry Point - `src/main.py`**

**Purpose:** Interactive CLI for managing TeX projects

**Key Components:**
- Uses `click` framework for command-line interface
- Imports from `itep.manager` module (the core ITeP system)
- Uses `app.iofunc.gather_input()` for user input validation
- **Structure:**
  - `cli()` - Main Click group decorator
  - `start()` - Interactive menu loop that:
    - Clears screen and displays current configuration
    - Accepts user input to trigger various options
    - Supports direct function calls via `getattr(manager, opt)`
    - Evaluates complex arguments with `eval()`
    - Saves configuration on exit
- **Input flow:** User вҶ’ regex validation вҶ’ function execution вҶ’ config update

---

### 3. **Shared Utilities - `src/appfunc/` Directory**

#### **`iofunc.py` - Input/Output and Configuration Functions**

**Core abstractions:**
- `FieldSpec[T]` - Dataclass defining input specification (prompt, regex pattern, parser)
- `spec()` - Factory function to create FieldSpec instances
- `ask()` - Prompts user with FieldSpec and validates/parses input with error handling
- `gather_input()` - Legacy backward-compatible string input with regex validation (returns raw string)
- `gather_dataclass()` - Generic dataclass field collection using FieldSpec metadata:
  - Iterates through dataclass fields
  - Checks `f.metadata["input"]` for FieldSpec
  - Supports Optional types and nested dataclasses (partially implemented)
  - Commented-out support for List types and nested dataclasses

**Key Pattern:** Input validation uses **compiled regex patterns** with user retry logic

**Type helpers:**
- `_is_optional()` - Detects `Optional[T]` types
- `_unwrap_optional()` - Extracts T from `Optional[T]`
- `_is_list_of_dataclass()` - Detects `List[Dataclass]`
- `_is_list()` - Detects List types

#### **`options.py` - Enumeration Selection**

- `select_enum_type()` - Interactive menu to choose from an iterable:
  - Displays numbered options
  - Accepts integer input
  - Special case: `-1` to skip (raises `StopIteration`)
  - Validates choice is within range
  - Returns selected item

#### **`mainmenu.py` - Project Architecture Comment**

Documentation describing three major components:
1. **ITeP** - Init Tex Project (configuration API)
2. **lectkit** - Standalone utility functions
3. **PRISMAR** - RPISMA 2020 SQL implementation for reference management

---

### 4. **Test Suite - `tests/`**

#### **`test_links_cli.py` - CLI Integration Tests**

Tests for `itep.links.cli` using Click's CliRunner:
1. **`test_cli_is_click_command()`** - Verifies cli is a Click command
2. **`test_cli_help_runs_and_shows_usage()`** - Validates `--help` works and shows usage
3. **`test_cli_version_if_available()`** - Checks version flag if declared
4. **`test_cli_invocation_without_args_shows_usage_or_succeeds()`** - Tests default behavior

**Testing patterns:** Uses Click's CliRunner for isolated CLI testing without filesystem side effects

#### **`test_ioconfig.py`** - Empty stub (1 line file)

---

### 5. **Core ITeP Module - `src/itep/`**

#### **`structure.py` - Data Models and Project Structure**

**Enums and Constants:**
- `FriendlyEnumMeta` - Custom enum metaclass with better error messages
- `ConfigType(StrEnum)` - BASE, EVAL, PRESS
- `Institution(StrEnum)` - UCR, UFide, UCIMED
- `GeneralDirectory(StrEnum)` - LEC, IMG, BIB, EXE

**Core Dataclasses:**

1. **`ProjectModel`** - Base template for project structures
   - Fields: name, parent, root, patterns, main_topics, tree (directory list), links
   - Implements `__iter__()` for dict conversion

2. **`WeekDay`** - Schedule information with computed fields
   - Input fields: week_number, lecture_day, first_monday, init_time, tmz
   - Computed fields: code (formatted), day_date (datetime)
   - Uses FieldSpec for regex-validated input

3. **`ConfigData`** - Link/target file relationship
   - Parses file naming conventions (links and targets)
   - Methods: `get_relation()`, `from_relations()`

4. **`MetaData`** - Project-level metadata
   - Fields: abs_parent_dir, abs_src_dir, created_at, last_modification, version

5. **`Evaluation`** - Evaluation specification
   - Fields: name, amount (number of evaluations)
   - Post-init: gathers WeekDay data for each evaluation

6. **`Admin`** - Course administration info
   - Institution, week count, lectures per week, year, cycle, first Monday
   - Post-init: gathers lecture days (WeekDay for each lecture) and evaluations
   - Uses `gather_dataclass()` for nested data

7. **`Book`** - Book reference
   - Fields: code, name, edition
   - Method: `get_dir_name()` - formats as "{code}_{name}_{edition}"
   - Class method: `from_directory()` - selects from filesystem

8. **`Topic`** - Course topic
   - Fields: name, root, chapters (optional), weeks (optional)
   - Class methods: `from_directory()`, `create_directory()`
   - Method: `add_book_chapter()` - adds formatted chapter codes

9. **`ProjectStructure`** - Main configuration container
   - Fields: code, name, project_type (ProjectModel), data, admin, topics, books, configs
   - Post-init: formats root path using templates
   - Method: `init_directories()` - creates directory tree with topic substitution

**Design Pattern:** Heavy use of FieldSpec metadata for declarative input validation

#### **`links.py` - Symlink CLI Command**

**Purpose:** Recreate symlinks based on config.yaml

**Core Functions:**
- `safe_symlink()` - Creates/updates symlinks with conflict handling
- `create_config_links()` - Links config files (sty, templates)
- `create_topics_links()` - Links topic exercise directories
- `create_links()` - Generic symlink creation

**CLI Command (`@click.command`):**
- Takes optional project_dir argument
- Options: --parent (default parent directory), --src (source template dir)
- Reads config.yaml and loads MetaData
- Processes topics and books to create link relationships
- Creates symlinks for eval and press configurations

#### **`ioconfig.py` - Configuration I/O**

Functions for YAML-based configuration:
- `load_config()` - Reads config.yaml into ProjectStructure
- `_to_dict()` - Recursive converter for ProjectStructure to dict:
  - Handles primitives (int, str, Path)
  - Handles dates/datetimes (ISO format)
  - Handles lists, dataclasses with proper formatting
  - Supports custom `structure_repr()` method
- `save_config()` - Writes ProjectStructure to YAML

#### **`manager.py` - Project Management**

**Functions:**
- `set_project_type()` - Selects project type from enum
- `restart_metadata()` - Sets parent directory (with interactive prompt)
- `create_cfg()` - Stub for creating new config
- `update_cfg()` - Stub for updating from file
- `main()` - Main entry point (stub)

#### **`utils.py` - Utility Functions**

**Directory Operations:**
- `ensure_dir()` - Creates directory with user confirmation or forced creation
- `code_format()` - Formats codes: "ind" + zero-padded "sec" (e.g., "W01", "L1")

**Data Operations:**
- `add_to_reference_dict()` - Accumulates objects from directory via Protocol
- `set_directory_list()` - Interactive selection of multiple directories
- `load_yaml()` - YAML parser with error handling
- `write_yaml()` - YAML writer
- `enter_hours()` - Parses schedule input (hour, timezone)

**Protocols:**
- `DefinedByFiles` - Type hint for objects that can be loaded from directories

#### **`defaults.py` - Configuration Constants**

```python
DEF_ABS_PARENT_DIR = Path("/home/luis/Documents/01-U/00-Fisica")
DEF_ABS_SRC_DIR = Path("/home/luis/.config/mytex")
DEF_TEX_CONFIG = {...}  # LaTeX style file mappings
```

#### **`database.py` - Django Models (Not Currently Used)**

**Schema Definition:**
- `Main_topic` - Physics topic categories
- `Topic`, `Book`, `Author`, `Course` - Core domain objects
- `Institution_configuration` - Institution settings (weeks, moodle URL)
- `Evaluation`, `EvaluationsItem` - Assessment structure
- `CoursesContent`, `CoursesEvaluation` - Course scheduling
- Complex relationships with foreign keys and unique constraints

**Status:** Appears to be a planned feature for managing content across courses

#### **`models.py` - Project Type Models**

Two concrete project implementations:

1. **`GeneralProject`**
   - For general physics topics
   - Root format: "{code}-{name}"
   - Tree: bib, config, img, projects, tex (with subdirectories)
   - Links to bibliography, images, and exercises

2. **`LectureProject`**
   - For university lecture courses
   - Root format: "{institution}-{code}"
   - Separate eval and lect (lecture) subtrees
   - More complex link structure for course-specific content

#### **`create.py`** - Project initialization (imported but not fully read)

---

### **Key Design Patterns Identified:**

1. **Input Validation Pipeline:** Regex pattern вҶ’ user prompt вҶ’ parser вҶ’ typed result
2. **Dataclass-Driven Configuration:** FieldSpec metadata for declarative input
3. **Interactive Selection:** Enum-based menus with validation
4. **Symlink Management:** Safe creation with conflict detection
5. **YAML Configuration:** Bidirectional serialization with ProjectStructure
6. **Template Expansion:** Directory paths using variable substitution
7. **Protocol-Based Polymorphism:** Objects loaded via `from_directory()`

### **Current State:**
- ITeP module is the main "Init Tex Project" system
- appfunc provides shared input/output utilities
- Manager and ioconfig handle configuration lifecycle
- Links command recreates symlinks from YAML config
- Database schema is defined but not integrated
- Most interactive features built on Click + dataclass metadata

---

**Absolute file paths referenced:**
- `/home/luis/Projects/WorkFlow/docs/ADR/structure.md`
- `/home/luis/Projects/WorkFlow/src/main.py`
- `/home/luis/Projects/WorkFlow/src/appfunc/iofunc.py`
- `/home/luis/Projects/WorkFlow/src/appfunc/options.py`
- `/home/luis/Projects/WorkFlow/src/appfunc/mainmenu.py`
- `/home/luis/Projects/WorkFlow/src/itep/structure.py`
- `/home/luis/Projects/WorkFlow/src/itep/links.py`
- `/home/luis/Projects/WorkFlow/src/itep/ioconfig.py`

- `FieldSpec[T]` - Dataclass defining input specification (prompt, regex pattern, parser)
- `spec()` - Factory function to create FieldSpec instances
- `ask()` - Prompts user with FieldSpec and validates/parses input with error handling
- `gather_input()` - Legacy backward-compatible string input with regex validation (returns raw string)
- `gather_dataclass()` - Generic dataclass field collection using FieldSpec metadata:
  - Iterates through dataclass fields
  - Checks `f.metadata["input"]` for FieldSpec
  - Supports Optional types and nested dataclasses (partially implemented)
  - Commented-out support for List types and nested dataclasses

**Key Pattern:** Input validation uses **compiled regex patterns** with user retry logic

**Type helpers:**
- `_is_optional()` - Detects `Optional[T]` types
- `_unwrap_optional()` - Extracts T from `Optional[T]`
- `_is_list_of_dataclass()` - Detects `List[Dataclass]`
- `_is_list()` - Detects List types

#### **`options.py` - Enumeration Selection**

- `select_enum_type()` - Interactive menu to choose from an iterable:
  - Displays numbered options
  - Accepts integer input
  - Special case: `-1` to skip (raises `StopIteration`)
  - Validates choice is within range
  - Returns selected item

Documentation describing three major components:
1. **ITeP** - Init Tex Project (configuration API)
2. **lectkit** - Standalone utility functions
3. **PRISMAR** - RPISMA 2020 SQL implementation for reference management

#### **`structure.py` - Data Models and Project Structure**

**Enums and Constants:**
- `FriendlyEnumMeta` - Custom enum metaclass with better error messages
- `ConfigType(StrEnum)` - BASE, EVAL, PRESS
- `Institution(StrEnum)` - UCR, UFide, UCIMED
- `GeneralDirectory(StrEnum)` - LEC, IMG, BIB, EXE

**Core Dataclasses:**

1. **`ProjectModel`** - Base template for project structures
   - Fields: name, parent, root, patterns, main_topics, tree (directory list), links
   - Implements `__iter__()` for dict conversion

2. **`WeekDay`** - Schedule information with computed fields
   - Input fields: week_number, lecture_day, first_monday, init_time, tmz
   - Computed fields: code (formatted), day_date (datetime)
   - Uses FieldSpec for regex-validated input

3. **`ConfigData`** - Link/target file relationship
   - Parses file naming conventions (links and targets)
   - Methods: `get_relation()`, `from_relations()`

4. **`MetaData`** - Project-level metadata
   - Fields: abs_parent_dir, abs_src_dir, created_at, last_modification, version

5. **`Evaluation`** - Evaluation specification
   - Fields: name, amount (number of evaluations)
   - Post-init: gathers WeekDay data for each evaluation

6. **`Admin`** - Course administration info
   - Institution, week count, lectures per week, year, cycle, first Monday
   - Post-init: gathers lecture days (WeekDay for each lecture) and evaluations
   - Uses `gather_dataclass()` for nested data

7. **`Book`** - Book reference
   - Fields: code, name, edition
   - Method: `get_dir_name()` - formats as "{code}_{name}_{edition}"
   - Class method: `from_directory()` - selects from filesystem

8. **`Topic`** - Course topic
   - Fields: name, root, chapters (optional), weeks (optional)
   - Class methods: `from_directory()`, `create_directory()`
   - Method: `add_book_chapter()` - adds formatted chapter codes

9. **`ProjectStructure`** - Main configuration container
   - Fields: code, name, project_type (ProjectModel), data, admin, topics, books, configs
   - Post-init: formats root path using templates
   - Method: `init_directories()` - creates directory tree with topic substitution

**Design Pattern:** Heavy use of FieldSpec metadata for declarative input validation

### **Key Design Patterns Identified:**

1. **Input Validation Pipeline:** Regex pattern вҶ’ user prompt вҶ’ parser вҶ’ typed result
2. **Dataclass-Driven Configuration:** FieldSpec metadata for declarative input
3. **Interactive Selection:** Enum-based menus with validation
4. **Symlink Management:** Safe creation with conflict detection
5. **YAML Configuration:** Bidirectional serialization with ProjectStructure
6. **Template Expansion:** Directory paths using variable substitution
7. **Protocol-Based Polymorphism:** Objects loaded via `from_directory()`

### **Current State:**
- ITeP module is the main "Init Tex Project" system
- appfunc provides shared input/output utilities
- Manager and ioconfig handle configuration lifecycle
- Links command recreates symlinks from YAML config
- Database schema is defined but not integrated
- Most interactive features built on Click + dataclass metadata

### 3. **create.py** - Project Creation Flow

**Key Functions:**

**gather_code(name, patterns)** - Iteratively collects code segments matching patterns

**gather_name(code)** - Prompts for project name with confirmation

**define_new_topics(path, topic, idx)** - Interactive loop to create new Topic objects

**relate_topic_books(books, topics)** - Links chapters from books to topics

**set_week_distribution(topics, admin)** - Distributes lectures across topics and weeks

**create_cfg(parent_dir)** (lines 127-196) - Main orchestration:
1. Validates parent directory
2. Selects project type (enum)
3. Gathers code and name
4. Creates MetaData with parent path
5. If LECT: creates Admin object (prompts for institution, weeks, lectures/week, etc.)
6. Loads main_topics from filesystem
7. Loads Books from directories
8. Loads Topics and allows creating new ones
9. Links books to topics
10. If LECT: distributes weeks
11. Creates ProjectStructure
12. Calls init_directories() and init_links() (not shown, but in ProjectStructure)
13. Calls save() to write config.yaml

- Handles dates (вҶ’ isoformat), paths (вҶ’ str), lists, and nested dataclasses

- All datetime/date objects serialized as ISO strings

### 10. **Data Duplication & Cross-Layer Issues**

**DUPLICATED DATA:**

1. **Institution Info** - Exists in THREE places:
   - `Admin.institution` (enum in dataclass)
   - `Institution_configuration` (Django ORM table)
   - `ProjectModel.root` template uses `{institution}` variable
   - **Problem:** Not synced; Admin data not persisted to DB

2. **Course/Topic Info** - Duplicated across:
   - `ProjectStructure.topics` (Dict[str, Topic] dataclass)
   - `Topic` (Django ORM)
   - `Main_topic` (Django ORM with preloaded data)
   - **Problem:** Dataclass changes not reflected in DB

3. **Book Metadata**:
   - `ProjectStructure.books` (Dict[str, Book] dataclass)
   - `Book` (Django ORM)
   - `BooksAuthor` and `BooksContents` (junction tables)
   - **Problem:** Manual sync required

4. **Evaluation Data**:
   - `Admin.evaluation` (List[Evaluation] dataclass)
   - `Evaluation` (Django ORM)
   - `Item` (Django ORM - assessment items)
   - `EvaluationsItem` (junction)
   - `CoursesEvaluation` (junction)
   - **Problem:** Dataclass evaluations don't map to ORM

5. **Schedule Data**:
   - `Admin.week_day` (List[int] in dataclass)
   - `Admin.evaluation[*].duedate` (List[WeekDay] objects)
   - `CoursesContent.lecture_week` (int in ORM)
   - `CoursesEvaluation.evaluation_week` (int in ORM)
   - **Problem:** No bidirectional sync; computed dates not stored

**Book** (lines 328-346) - Reference book metadata
```

```

**Topic** (lines 350-396) - Course topic/subject
```
- name: str
```

**ConfigData** (lines 153-192) - Symlink relationship mapping
```

```

**ProjectModel** (lines 53-63) - Base for project types
```
- name: str

```

### 2. **models.py** - Project Type Definitions

```
name: "general"

patterns: {numbering: "^[0-9]{2}", initials: "^[A-Z]{2}"}
main_topics: DEF_ABS_PARENT_DIR / "00BB-Library"
tree: [bib, config, img, projects, tex, tex/000-*, tex/{t_idx:03}-{t_name}]
```

```
links: Two parallel subtrees (eval/ and lect/) with their own configs and symlinks
```

### 3. **create.py** - Project Creation Flow

**create_cfg(parent_dir)** (lines 127-196) - Main orchestration:

6. Loads main_topics from filesystem

8. Loads Topics and allows creating new ones

13. Calls save() to write config.yaml

### 4. **ioconfig.py** - Config I/O

**load_config(file)** - Reads YAML and reconstructs ProjectStructure

**save_config(cfg, path)** - Converts ProjectStructure to YAML
- Uses `_to_dict()` helper to recursively serialize dataclasses
- Handles dates (вҶ’ isoformat), paths (вҶ’ str), lists, and nested dataclasses
- Respects custom `structure_repr()` if defined

**load_yaml(path)** - Returns dict from YAML file

**write_yaml(path, data)** - Writes dict to YAML file

**enter_hours(name)** - Prompts for hour,timezone (e.g., "13,-6")

---

### 6. **links.py** - Symlink Management

**safe_symlink(target, link_path)** - Creates symlink, handles existing ones:
- Removes stale links (unchanged: silent, changed: unlinked)
- Skips if regular file exists

**create_config_links(target_dir, abs_src_dir, links_relations, config_type, src_type)** - Creates symlinks in config/ subdirs to .sty files

**create_topics_links(target_dir, abs_src_dir, links_relations)** - Creates symlinks in topic dirs to exercise files

**create_links(link_dir, relations)** - Generic symlink creator from dict

**CLI relink** (lines 66-119) - Recreates all symlinks from config.yaml:
1. Reads config.yaml
2. Reconstructs MetaData and paths
3. Iterates topics вҶ’ chapters вҶ’ books

Now I have a comprehensive understanding of the codebase. Let me analyze the key design issues and think about what to discuss with the user.

The user wants to discuss the design of itep, specifically:
1. They added `database.py` because the YAML config approach leads to data duplication
2. They want to evaluate whether to migrate symlink info to structured tables
3. They want a design conversation, not implementation details

Let me read the actual database.py and structure.py files myself to make sure I have the details right before launching the Plan agent.

Let me think about the key design tensions:

**Current state (YAML config):**


The YAML approach embeds everything in each project's configвҖ”institution details, course info, books, topics, and symlinks all get duplicated whenever the same course runs in multiple cycles, and institution metadata like week counts gets hardcoded in enums and repeated everywhere.

**New database.py approach:**
The database normalizes this into separate tables for institutions, courses, books, authors, topics, and content relationships, eliminating the duplication.

I'm identifying the junction tables neededвҖ”BooksAuthor, BooksContents, CoursesContent, CoursesEvaluation, CoursesEvaluationsContentвҖ”to properly model these many-to-many relationships.

Now I need to figure out the core design decisions: what actually belongs in the database versus what stays in config.yaml, whether config.yaml becomes just a thin reference file with project IDs and paths, how symlinks should be handled (derived from the database or still config-driven), which ORM to use (Django feels too heavy for a CLI tool), and how to migrate from the existing YAML structure. The user wants to have a conversation about the design approach rather than just get a solution, so I should focus on clarifying these questions with them.

from django.db import models
from itep.structure import Institution

main_topics_data = [
    ["MГ©todos MatemГЎticos", "01MM", "530.15"],
    ["MГ©todos NumГ©ricos", "02MM", "530.15"],
    ["MecГЎnica ClГЎsica", "10MC", "531"],
    ["Ondas", "14MC", "534.1"],
    ["Termodinamica", "20TD", "536.7"],
    ["EstadГӯstica", "21TD", "530.13"],
    ["FГӯsica Computacional", "22TD", "530.0285"],
    ["Optica", "30MO", "535"],
    ["Electromagnetismo", "40EM", "537.1"],
    ["MecГЎnica CuГЎntica", "50MQ", "530.12"],
    ["FГӯsica Nuclear", "60FN", "539.7"],
    ["Estado SГіlido", "70ES", "531.2"],
    ["Relatividad", "80MR", "530.11"],
    ["Relatividad Especial", "81MR", "530.11"],
    ["Relatividad General", "82MR", "530.11"],
    ["MeteorologГӯa", "90FM", "532"],
]


class Main_topic(models.Model):
    name: str
    code: str
    ddc_mds: str

    class Meta:
        constraints = [
            models.UniqueConstraint(
                fields=["code", "name"],
                name="unique_author_entry",
            )
        ]


class Topic(models.Model):
    id_main_topic = models.ForeignKey(Main_topic, on_delete=models.PROTECT)
    name: str
    serial_number: int


class Book(models.Model):
    name: str
    year: int
    edition: int


class Author(models.Model):
    first_name = models.CharField(max_length=40)
    last_name = models.CharField(max_length=200)
    alias = models.SmallIntegerField(default=0, blank=True, null=True)
    affiliation = models.CharField(max_length=100, blank=True, null=True)
    created_at = models.DateTimeField(auto_now_add=True)
    updated_at = models.DateTimeField(auto_now=True)

    class Meta:
        constraints = [
            models.UniqueConstraint(
                fields=["first_name", "last_name"],
                name="unique_author_entry",
            )
        ]

    def __str__(self):
        return f"{self.last_name}, {self.first_name}"


author_type_list = {
    "author": "author",
    "bookauthor": "bookauthor",
    "editor": "editor",
    "afterword": "afterword",
    "annotator": "annotator",
    "commentator": "commentator",
    "forward": "forward",
    "introduction": "introduction",
    "translator": "translator",
    "holder": "holder",
}


class Author_type(models.Model):
    type_of_author = models.CharField(max_length=12, choices=author_type_list)

    def __str__(self):
        return str(self.type_of_author)


class BooksAuthor(models.Model):
    first_author = models.BooleanField(default=False)
    id_author = models.ForeignKey(Author, on_delete=models.PROTECT)
    id_book = models.ForeignKey(Book, on_delete=models.PROTECT)
    category = models.ForeignKey(Author_type, on_delete=models.PROTECT)

    class Meta:
        constraints = [
            models.UniqueConstraint(
                fields=["id_author", "id_article", "category"],
                name="unique_author_function_per_article",
            )
        ]


class Content(models.Model):
    id_topic = models.ForeignKey(Topic, on_delete=models.PROTECT)
    chapter_number: int
    section_number: int
    name: str
    first_page: int
    last_page: int
    first_exercise_number: int | None
    last_exercise_number: int | None


class BooksContents(models.Model):
    id_book = models.ForeignKey(Book, on_delete=models.PROTECT)
    id_content = models.ForeignKey(Content, on_delete=models.PROTECT)


institutions_data = [
    [
        Institution.UCR,
        "Universidad de Costa Rica",
        18,
        "Semestre",
        "mv.mediacionvirtual.ucr.ac.cr",
    ],
    [
        Institution.FIDE,
        "Universidad FidГ©litas",
        15,
        "Cuatrimestre",
        "www.fidevirtual.org",
    ],
    [
        Institution.UCIMED,
        "Universiad de las Ciencias MГ©dicas",
        24,
        "Semestre",
        "uvirtual.ucimed.com",
    ],
]


class Institution_configuration(models.Model):
    short_name: Institution
    full_name: str
    cicle_weeks: int
    cicle_name: str
    moodle_url: str


taxonomy_levels = {
    1: "Recordar",
    2: "Comprender",
    3: "AnГЎlisis",
    4: "Usar-Aplicar",
    5: "Usar-Evaluar",
    6: "Usar-Crear",
    7: "Metacognitivo",
    8: "Sistema interno",
}

taxonomy_domains = {
    1: "InformaciГіn",
    2: "Procedimiento Mental",
    3: "Procedimiento Psicomotor",
    4: "Metacognitivo",
}


class Item(models.Model):
    name: str
    template_file: str
    taxonomy_level = models.CharField(max_length=12, choices=taxonomy_levels)
    taxonomy_domain = models.CharField(max_length=12, choices=taxonomy_domains)


class Evaluation(models.Model):
    id_institution = models.ForeignKey(
        Institution_configuration,
        on_delete=models.PROTECT,
    )
    name: str
    template_file: str


class EvaluationsItem(models.Model):
    id_evaluation = models.ForeignKey(Evaluation, on_delete=models.PROTECT)
    id_item = models.ForeignKey(Item, on_delete=models.PROTECT)
    total_amount: int
    points_por_item: int


class Course(models.Model):
    id_institution = models.ForeignKey(
        Institution_configuration,
        on_delete=models.PROTECT,
    )
    code: str
    name: str
    lectures_per_week: int
    hours_per_lecture: int


class CoursesContent(models.Model):
    id_course = models.ForeignKey(Course, on_delete=models.PROTECT)
    id_content = models.ForeignKey(Content, on_delete=models.PROTECT)
    lecture_week: int

    class Meta:
        constraints = [
            # lecture_week <= Course.Institution.cicle_weeks I need help implementing this  restriction
        ]


class CoursesEvaluation(models.Model):
    id_course = models.ForeignKey(Course, on_delete=models.PROTECT)
    id_evaluation = models.ForeignKey(Evaluation, on_delete=models.PROTECT)
    serial_number: int
    percentage: float
    evaluation_week: int

    class Meta:
        constraints = [
            # id_course.id_institution = id_evaluation.id_institution
            # lecture_week <= id_course.id_institution.cicle_weeks I need help implementing this  restriction
            # percentage between 0 to 1
        ]


class CoursesEvaluationsContent(models.Model):
    id_courses_evaluation = models.ForeignKey(
        CoursesEvaluation,
        on_delete=models.PROTECT,
    )
    id_courses_content = models.ForeignKey(
        CoursesContent,
        on_delete=models.PROTECT,
    )
    id_evaluation_item = models.ForeignKey(
        EvaluationsItem,
        on_delete=models.PROTECT,
    )
    distribution_weight: float

    class Meta:
        constraints = [
            # id_courses_content.id_course = id_courses_evaluation.id_course
            # id_courses_evaluation.id_evaluation = id_evaluation_item.id_evaluation
            # distribution_weight between 0 to 1
        ]
